title: Global Marketing Services Agreement
contract_text: Marketing Services Agreement between GlobalBrand and AdAgency for EU and California campaigns.

clauses.text: AdAgency shall deliver marketing services per Schedule A.
AdAgency assigns to GlobalBrand all IP created during the engagement, including pre-existing tools used in deliverables.
AdAgency shall collect, store, and process consumer personal data without restriction on purpose or duration.
Liquidated damages of 10% of fees per day of campaign delay, with no upper limit.
Either party may terminate at will, but only AdAgency must provide 90 days notice.
AdAgency shall not work with any competitor of GlobalBrand for 5 years worldwide.
GlobalBrand may audit AdAgency without prior notice at any time.
Consumers may opt out of personalized advertising via the GlobalBrand website.
AdAgency's prices to GlobalBrand shall be no higher than to any other client.
Upon change of control of AdAgency, this Agreement terminates automatically.
AdAgency indemnifies GlobalBrand for all claims, including those resulting from GlobalBrand's own conduct.
